content:
Here are some basic tips for formatting your essay in APA style:

Use 12-point Times New Roman font.
Double-space your paper.
Include a page header at the top of every page, including the title page, with the page number.
Margins should be one inch on all sides of your paper.
Indent the first line of each paragraph half an inch from the left margin.
After you finish this page, click Next to continue to APA Style Citations and References.

Week 5 | APA Style Citation and References

Using APA Citations and References
Using the APA style shows your diligence as a researcher and writer committed to academic honesty. APA style has very specific ways of citing and referencing sources. Citations are given in the body of a paragraph to indicate ownership of an idea or fact to another source. References are presented in a list at the end of the paper. The Purdue OwlLinks to an external site. is a free, user-friendly guide to APA style and an excellent resource.

Paraphrases
Citations are contained in the body of a paragraph. You may see one like this:
